meaning: n.亚当(<<圣经>>故事人物,所谓人类始祖)
examples: Adam sought guidance from the Almighty.
Adam jumped from his seat at the girl's cry.
Adam pressed a button and waited for the lift.
Adam Hart, from the Gloucester Bee Guardians Project, said the scheme would start next February.
Adam Byatt's chic Trinity Restaurant in Clapham is perfect for an evening out with friends.
